**IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS**

### BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-FOCUS ON OPEN COMMUNICATION AND RECOGNIZING DIVERSE VOICES  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-EMPHASIZE CONSISTENT SUPPORT AND RELIABILITY TO FOSTER LONG-TERM CONNECTIONS
